## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services with Obsidian Security team members.](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation at scale, combining advanced LLM workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)
  - [Their process includes an 8-week strategy sprint followed by daily publishing (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Obsidian is interested in programmatic content generation and scaling up to 100-200 articles/month](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach emphasizes SEO best practices, fact-checking, and customization to client brand/voice](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)

## Topics

### Current AI Content Workflows at Obsidian

  - [Using LLMs to inform briefs, content templates, and SEO formulas](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Hybrid approach: AI suggestions + human writing/editing](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Example: AI-generated integration pages with human-written bullet points](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Concerns about AI content being too easily replicable by competitors](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Leverages multiple LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, EXA) in custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Creates detailed artifacts on company context, personas, and brand guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Multi-step process: brief generation, deep research, content creation, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Human experts can make manual edits and work with live chat for adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Fact-checking involves splitting content into chunks and validating against sources](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Content Types and Scale

  - [Editorial content (e.g., blog posts) and programmatic content (e.g., integration pages)](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [Target of 5 articles per week in Phase 2 (post-strategy sprint)](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1693.0)
  - [Capability to scale up to 100-200 articles/month, likely through programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### SEO and Quality Assurance

  - [Focus on SEO best practices and scientific approach to topic/keyword selection](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
  - [Multiple validation steps to ensure accuracy and brand alignment](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [Structured data and internal linking capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating high-quality content that avoids Google penalties](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Obsidian to review information and consider Phase 1 (strategy sprint) engagement](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2066.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting with Marcel (GrowthX CEO) if needed](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [Decision on Phase 1 needed soon to secure spot in 4-6 week backlog for kickoffs](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [Tina to follow up internally at Obsidian after receiving feedback from Amon](https://fathom.video/share/gVVJPNxQd9-FHRrd6DKuzhVFfv38VA6g?tab=summary&timestamp=2138.0)
